heading: Federal fleet fueling centers
label: 17053 Federal fleet fueling centers
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than , the head of each Federal agency shall install at least 1 renewable fuel pump at each Federal fleet fueling center in the United States under the jurisdiction of the head of the Federal agency.January 1, 2010
the number of Federal fleet fueling centers that contain at least 1 renewable fuel pump; and
the number of Federal fleet fueling centers that do not contain any renewable fuel pumps.

children.heading: Department of Defense facility
children.label: c Department of Defense facility
children.text: This section shall not apply to a Department of Defense fueling center with a fuel turnover rate of less than 100,000 gallons of fuel per year.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
